info.title: Ship8 API
info.description:
# Environment Ship8 domain for each environment list as below. - Production：portal.ship8.com - Sandbox：sandbox.ship8.com API endpoint format: https://{domain}/{apiPath} # Authentication Ship8 offers custom simplified JWT authentication:
Use your Ship8 account name and password to get an access token before visiting the business API.
Make sure your token is not expired. A new access token can be obtained by refreshing the token through the API before it expires. - Request Token: See details in the Request Token API under Account Category. - Refresh Token: See details in the Refresh Token API under Account Category.

post.description: Obtain token based on user account
Obtain new useable access token by old access token and refresh token

get.description: Get order related shipments Info API

tokenString.description: Refresh Token String, It is required in Refresh Token API when an access token is expired.

accessToken.description: Old Access Token which issued by Request Token API

refreshToken.description: A valid Refresh Token which issued by Request Token API

accessToken.description: Access Token, required when access business API
